query: Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac alternative

results.title: Top 13 Best AI Meeting Note Takers for Mac in 2025 (Free ...
results.content:
## 1. TuskNotes — The Private AI meeting Note Taker for Mac

### Best for: Privacy-first, on-device meeting notes (no bots, no cloud)

TuskNotes is a Mac-native AI meeting Note Taker built for professionals who can’t risk leaks. It’s optimized for Apple Silicon and processes summaries, transcripts, and recaps 100% locally—your audio and notes never leave your device. No recording bots join your calls; TuskNotes listens from your Mac, so meetings stay natural and discreet. [...] These tools won't give you AI summaries, but they're reliable, private, and completely free to use every day. You can go with these options when you don't need an AI Meeting Note taker.

### Conclusion

Finding the right AI meeting note taker for your Mac comes down to understanding your specific needs and priorities. If privacy is your main concern, TuskNotes offers complete on-device processing, while Fathom provides the most generous free plan for Zoom users. For sales teams, Sonnet excels with its CRM integration and participant background information, and international teams will appreciate Notta's support for over 50 languages. [...] Fastest Setup: Tactiq wins here. Just add the Chrome extension and it starts working right away when you join meetings in your browser. No bots to set up or accounts to configure.
 Most Private On-Device AI Meeting Note Taker: TuskNotes takes the privacy crown. Everything happens on your Mac with no cloud processing. Your audio and notes never leave your computer, making it perfect for sensitive meetings.
 Best Free Plan: Fathom offers the most generous free option. You get unlimited recording and transcription on Zoom calls without any caps on meeting length or number of meetings.

results.title: 8 Best Local AI Meeting Note Takers for Mac in 2026
results.content:
Its local story is meaningful. Alter's meeting page says it supports private transcriptions that happen on your device, works across Zoom, Teams, Meet, WhatsApp, and in-person meetings, and is used by Mac users who process meetings on-device.

Alter also supports local models through Ollama and LM Studio. Its documentation frames local AI as a solution for lawyers, doctors, security researchers, and anyone working with sensitive data, and says local models keep data on the Mac and can work offline.

For meeting notes, this means Alter can support a local/private workflow when configured that way. Users who want fully local processing should choose local models in settings. Users who prefer speed, larger models, or cloud-provider flexibility can also use Alter with cloud AI providers. [...] | Tool | True Local? | Offline? | Bot-Free? | Processing Model | Best For |
 ---  ---  --- |
| Mumble AI | Yes, | Yes | Yes | On-device recording, transcription, speaker labels, and summary in Local Mode; Cloud Mode available | Polished private Mac meeting notes |
| Talat | Yes | Yes | Yes | On-device meeting transcription and summaries on Mac | One-time-payment local meeting notes |
| Alter | Yes, if configured locally | Yes, for local meeting mode | Yes | Local meeting transcription and speaker ID; AI notes can use Ollama, LM Studio, BYOK, or cloud providers | Regulated-industry users who want local/private workflows |
| Meetily | Yes, if configured locally | Yes | Yes | Local transcription and Ollama-based summary | Developers and self-hosted teams | [...] Local AI is hardware-dependent.

If you have an Apple Silicon Mac with 24GB unified memory or more, Mumble Local Mode is a strong fit because it can run the full meeting-note workflow on-device.

If you have an M1 or M2 Mac with less memory, Talat, Alter local transcription, or a lighter Meetily/Hyprnote setup may be more practical.

If you are on an Intel Mac, local AI meeting notes are usually not worth the tradeoff. Use a cloud tool or upgrade to Apple Silicon.

### 3. Do you want a meeting recorder or a voice workspace?

If you only want meeting notes, Talat is clean and focused.

If you want meeting notes plus dictation, voice notes, AI rewriting, and local/cloud switching, Mumble is broader.

 No dedicated Android or Windows apps, so it's tough if you don't use Apple
 Can't create nicely formatted summaries with headers and bullets right away
 Exporting transcripts could be easier, especially on mobile

Source: Reddit

‍

## 4. Slipbox AI

Best For: Mac users wanting real-time transcription without bots and with full privacy.  
Similar To: Jamie, Sonnet AI, MeetKat, VOMO AI, Nutshell AI

Source: Slipbox

Slipbox gives Mac users a private meeting assistant that works in real-time. It handles transcription, summaries, and meeting notes right on your device. Your data stays on your machine - no bots join calls, and nothing gets sent to servers. Slipbox uses local processing first, only using cloud features when you need them.

### Who Is It For [...] ### Cons

 Sometimes, recordings get stuck processing
 No web or desktop version available
 Limited editing tools for transcripts

Source: App Store

‍

## 10. Sonnet AI

Best For Busy professionals who need private, bot-free meeting notes fast.  
Similar To VOMO AI, Slipbox AI, Jamie, Flownote.ai, Tactiq

Source: Sonnet.ai

Sonnet AI cuts through the noise of basic transcription tools. It preps before meetings, records without adding bots, and delivers meeting insights you'll actually use. It also tracks relationships over time, turning your meetings into knowledge assets you can build on.

### Who Is It For

If you want private, automatic meeting notes without bots listening in.

### Key Features [...] ### Who Is It For

It's perfect for solo workers and small teams wanting private, easy meeting notes without extra work.

### Key Features

 Accurate Transcription: Gets high accuracy in multiple languages.
 Concise Summarization: Pulls out key points, action items, dates, and who said what.
 Background Recording: Works while your phone is locked or using other apps.
 Speaker Labels & Timestamps: Tags who's talking and when.
 Export Options: Share as PDF or text.

### Pricing

 Starter: $0 per month
 Monthly: $19.99 per month
 Annual: $199.99 per month

### Pros

 Highly accurate transcripts and reliable summaries
 Works directly on iOS without bots or uploading files
 Simple sharing for team use

### Cons

results.content:
Architecture of Meetily

Architecture of Meetily

Meetily is structured for modular, privacy-first AI processing:

## How to Install Meetily

### Frontend Installation

1️⃣ Download the latest version from GitHub Releases.

#### Windows Installation

2️⃣ Windows may warn about untrusted apps – Click More info → Run anyway.

Option 1: Using the Setup Executable (.exe) (Recommended)

`nsis.zip`
`meeting-minutes-frontend_0.1.0_x64-setup.exe`

Option 2: Using the MSI Installer (.msi)

`msi.zip`
`meeting-minutes-frontend_0.1.0_x64_en-US.msi`

#### macOS Installation

`dmg_darwin_arch64.zip`
`meeting-minutes-frontend_0.1.0_aarch64.dmg`
`meeting-minutes-frontend.app`
`xattr -c /Applications/meeting-minutes-frontend.app`

### Backend Installation
